{"cards": [{"name": "Whispered Secrets", "mana_cost": "{4}{U}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Delve
Draw two cards.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge flows like water through the cracks of memory.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Blue common instant with Delve that provides card advantage. The high base cost of {4}{U} makes Delve meaningful - players can exile 3-4 cards to cast this for {1}{U} or {2}{U}, making it an efficient draw spell in the late game. Simple single ability keeps it at common complexity."}, {"name": "Graveyard Scavenger", "mana_cost": "{4}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie Rogue", "oracle_text": "Delve
When ~ enters, target opponent discards a card and you gain 2 life.", "flavor_text": "It feeds on both flesh and memory, leaving nothing but emptiness behind.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Black uncommon creature with Delve and graveyard-themed ETB. The 3/2 body for potentially {1}{B} is reasonable with Delve. The ETB combines black's discard theme with minor lifegain, creating graveyard interaction while providing immediate value. Multi-ability design fits uncommon complexity."}, {"name": "Nature's Grand Convergence", "mana_cost": "{6}{G}{G}", "cmc": 8, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Convoke
Search your library for up to three creature cards with different names and put them onto the battlefield. Then shuffle.
Creatures you control get +2/+2 and trample until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Green rare sorcery with Convoke that creates a massive board presence. The high cost {6}{G}{G} becomes manageable with creature help via Convoke, fitting green's creature-based ramp philosophy. Tutoring multiple creatures plus anthem effect creates a splashy rare-worthy impact. Multi-ability design tests Convoke with complex effects."}, {"name": "Rally the Faithful", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Enchantment", "oracle_text": "Convoke
Whenever a creature you control attacks, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token that's tapped and attacking.", "flavor_text": "Each charge inspires ten more to follow.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White uncommon enchantment with Convoke and token generation. The triggered ability rewards aggressive strategies by creating exponential token growth - each attacking creature makes another attacker. Convoke helps deploy it early with creatures that immediately benefit. Multi-ability design fits uncommon, combining white's token and aggressive themes."}, {"name": "Stormfire Adept", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, ~ deals 1 damage to any target and gains haste until end of turn.
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.", "flavor_text": "Lightning flows through her veins, and chaos through her thoughts.", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Red rare creature with Prowess-like triggered ability plus unique combat damage trigger. The spell trigger provides immediate value and enables attacks, while the combat trigger offers red's impulsive card selection. Multi-ability design creates build-around potential for spellslinger decks. Stats are modest to balance the powerful effects at rare."}]}
